## Description

Briefly describe what this PR does and why. Link related issues (e.g., "Closes #123").

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature or enhancement
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Build/CI improvement
- [ ] License or branding change
- [ ] Refactor or cleanup

## Affected Repositories

Which repositories does this change touch? (e.g., core, sdkjs, web-apps, server, desktop-apps)

## Testing

How was this change tested?

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the contributing guidelines
- [ ] I have added SPDX license headers to new files
- [ ] Commit messages are in plain English (no feat: / fix: prefixes)
- [ ] I have linked related issues
- [ ] I have tested my changes (or explained why testing is not applicable)
